task_description: Screen each abstract for relevance to: machine learning applications in neuroimaging and brain disorder analysis. Label RELEVANT if the paper directly applies machine learning methods to neuroimaging data or brain disorder classification. Label NOT_RELEVANT otherwise.

papers.title: 3D Convolutional Neural Network for Alzheimer's Disease Classification from Structural MRI
papers.abstract: We develop a 3D CNN trained on T1-weighted structural MRI scans from the ADNI cohort to classify Alzheimer's disease, mild cognitive impairment, and cognitively normal subjects. Our model achieves classification accuracy of 0.89 and AUC 0.93 on a held-out test set of 450 scans. Gradient-based saliency maps identify hippocampal and entorhinal cortex regions as the most discriminative features, consistent with known neuropathology.
papers.topic_hint: deep learning, Alzheimer's disease, structural MRI, ADNI, neuroimaging
papers.methodology_hint: 3D CNN, T1-weighted MRI, ADNI dataset, accuracy 0.89, AUC 0.93, saliency maps
papers.claimed_contribution: 3D CNN for Alzheimer's classification from structural MRI with saliency-based interpretability.

papers.title: Topological Data Analysis of Simplicial Complexes in Pure Mathematics
papers.abstract: We develop new theoretical bounds on persistent homology for filtered simplicial complexes using algebraic topology. Our main results extend classical Betti number computations to higher-dimensional filtrations and provide algorithmic improvements for barcode computation. No empirical dataset or machine learning method is used.
papers.topic_hint: topology, persistent homology, simplicial complexes, algebraic topology
papers.methodology_hint: algebraic topology, Betti numbers, persistence barcodes, theoretical proofs only
papers.claimed_contribution: New theoretical bounds on persistent homology for higher-dimensional simplicial filtrations.

papers.title: Bidirectional LSTM for Automated Epileptic Seizure Detection from Scalp EEG
papers.abstract: We train a bidirectional LSTM on 200 hours of continuous scalp EEG recordings from the Temple University EEG Corpus to detect ictal events. The model achieves sensitivity of 0.87 and specificity of 0.91, outperforming a CNN baseline and a feature-engineering SVM approach. Real-time inference latency meets the requirements for bedside monitoring deployment.
papers.topic_hint: LSTM, epilepsy, seizure detection, EEG, neural signal processing
papers.methodology_hint: bidirectional LSTM, Temple University EEG, sensitivity 0.87, specificity 0.91, CNN and SVM comparison
papers.claimed_contribution: BiLSTM seizure detector from scalp EEG with real-time latency, outperforming CNN and SVM baselines.

papers.title: Stochastic Optimal Control for Spacecraft Attitude Manoeuvres Under Uncertainty
papers.abstract: We formulate spacecraft attitude control as a stochastic optimal control problem and derive closed-form policies using Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations under Gaussian process noise. Simulations confirm 40% fuel savings over PID baselines. No biomedical or neuroimaging data is involved.
papers.topic_hint: optimal control, spacecraft, attitude manoeuvre, Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman
papers.methodology_hint: stochastic optimal control, HJB equations, spacecraft simulation, PID comparison
papers.claimed_contribution: Closed-form stochastic attitude control policy achieving 40% fuel savings over PID baseline.

papers.title: Graph Convolutional Network for Functional Connectivity Analysis in Major Depression
papers.abstract: We model resting-state fMRI data as functional connectivity graphs and train a graph convolutional network to classify major depressive disorder versus healthy controls in a cohort of 620 participants. Node features are derived from 116 brain parcellations from the AAL atlas. The model achieves AUC 0.84, and SHAP-based attribution identifies the default mode network as the most depression-relevant subgraph.
papers.topic_hint: GCN, fMRI, functional connectivity, major depression, resting-state
papers.methodology_hint: graph convolutional network, resting-state fMRI, AAL atlas, AUC 0.84, SHAP attribution
papers.claimed_contribution: GCN for depression classification from fMRI functional connectivity graphs, AUC 0.84.

papers.title: Combinatorial Auction Mechanisms for Spectrum Allocation in Wireless Networks
papers.abstract: We design truthful combinatorial auction mechanisms for dynamic spectrum allocation in heterogeneous wireless networks. Our approach leverages primal-dual techniques to achieve near-optimal social welfare while satisfying incentive compatibility constraints. Simulation results confirm 30% throughput improvement over greedy baselines.
papers.topic_hint: auction mechanism, spectrum allocation, wireless networks, game theory
papers.methodology_hint: combinatorial auction, primal-dual algorithm, social welfare, spectrum simulation
papers.claimed_contribution: Truthful combinatorial spectrum auction achieving 30% throughput improvement with incentive compatibility.

papers.title: Multi-Scale Transformer for Parkinson's Disease Motor Severity Prediction from DaTscan
papers.abstract: We develop a multi-scale vision transformer trained on dopamine transporter (DaTscan) SPECT imaging from the PPMI cohort to predict Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale motor severity scores. The model achieves Spearman correlation 0.79 with clinical ratings and regression error within one UPDRS point for 73% of scans. Attention rollout maps highlight putamen and caudate regions consistent with dopaminergic pathology.
papers.topic_hint: transformer, Parkinson's disease, DaTscan, SPECT, UPDRS, motor severity
papers.methodology_hint: vision transformer, DaTscan SPECT, PPMI cohort, Spearman 0.79, attention rollout
papers.claimed_contribution: Multi-scale transformer for Parkinson's motor severity prediction from DaTscan with attention maps.

papers.title: Efficient Algorithms for Large-Scale Integer Linear Programming in Logistics
papers.abstract: We propose branch-and-cut enhancements for solving large-scale integer linear programs arising in vehicle routing and warehouse logistics. Our cutting plane strategy reduces the integrality gap by 18% on standard benchmark instances. No machine learning or biomedical application is considered.
papers.topic_hint: integer linear programming, branch-and-cut, vehicle routing, logistics optimisation
papers.methodology_hint: branch-and-cut, cutting planes, ILP benchmark, 18% integrality gap reduction
papers.claimed_contribution: Branch-and-cut enhancements reducing integrality gap by 18% on logistics ILP benchmarks.

papers.title: Convolutional Encoder-Decoder for White Matter Lesion Segmentation in Multiple Sclerosis MRI
papers.abstract: We train a U-Net-style convolutional encoder-decoder on T2-FLAIR MRI from 310 multiple sclerosis patients to segment white matter lesions. Our model achieves Dice coefficient 0.74 and lesion-level F1 of 0.81, outperforming FreeSurfer and three deep learning baselines on the ISBI 2015 MS challenge dataset. Lesion volume estimates correlate strongly with clinical disability scores.
papers.topic_hint: U-Net, white matter lesion, multiple sclerosis, T2-FLAIR, MRI segmentation
papers.methodology_hint: encoder-decoder CNN, FLAIR MRI, Dice 0.74, lesion F1 0.81, ISBI 2015 benchmark
papers.claimed_contribution: Encoder-decoder for MS white matter lesion segmentation achieving Dice 0.74 on ISBI benchmark.

papers.title: Distributed Ledger Technologies for Cross-Border Trade Finance
papers.abstract: We analyse the feasibility of permissioned blockchain architectures for automating cross-border trade finance operations, covering letter of credit issuance, document verification, and settlement. We evaluate throughput and latency under varying network conditions. No biomedical or machine learning component is included.
papers.topic_hint: blockchain, distributed ledger, trade finance, cross-border payments
papers.methodology_hint: permissioned blockchain, throughput/latency evaluation, trade finance workflow
papers.claimed_contribution: Analysis of permissioned blockchain for automating cross-border trade finance operations.
